name: Molasses Apricot Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300°F (150°C).
2. In a medium bowl, mix together flour, baking soda, cinnamon, ginger, and allspice.
3. Mix until blended well.
4. In a large mixing bowl, beat sugar and butter at medium speed until the mixture forms a grainy paste.
5. Scrape sides of the bowl.
6. Add molasses and egg and beat until light and fluffy.
7. Add flour mixture and apricots and blend at a low speed just until combined.
8. Do not overmix.
9. Divide dough into two halves and shape each half into a roll about 1 1/2 inches in diameter.
10. Wrap rolls in waxed paper and chill until firm.
11. Slice cookies into 1/2-inch thick rounds and place on ungreased cookie sheets about 2 inches apart.
12. Bake for 25-30 minutes or until the cookies are set.
13. Transfer to a cool surface.
14. Icing: In a small bowl, blend sugar, milk, and vanilla extract until smooth.
15. Drizzle the icing over the cooled cookies.
